name: International Petroleum Corporation
description: International Petroleum Corporation (IPC) is an international oil and gas exploration and production company with a high-quality portfolio of assets located in Canada, Malaysia, and France. Spun off from Lundin Petroleum in 2017, IPC is focused on creating value through the acquisition, exploration, and development of oil and gas properties. The company is incorporated in Canada and its shares are listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) and the Nasdaq Stockholm under the symbol IPCO.
